title: MGU Time Table 2026 for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations

detail.title: MGU Time Table 2026 for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations
detail.short_info: MGU Time Table 2026 released for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations. Mahatma Gandhi University has rescheduled exams from 29 June 2026. Check revised dates, timings and PDF download details at mgu.ac.in.

sections.heading: MGU Time Table 2026 for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations

content.text: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU), Kerala has officially released the revised MGU Time Table 2026 for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations. In continuation of the earlier notification dated 18.05.2026, the examinations originally scheduled from 29.05.2026 have been postponed and rescheduled to commence from 29.06.2026. Students of 2025 Admission Regular, 2022-2024 Admissions Supplementary, and 2021 Admission First Mercy Chance can now check the updated schedule on the official website – www.mgu.ac.in.
This rescheduled MGU Time Table 2026 is crucial for all LLM candidates. Students are advised to download the official notification PDF and prepare accordingly.

Mahatma Gandhi University has announced the revised MGU Time Table 2026 for the I Semester LLM examinations. The exams will now be conducted in the afternoon session with specific timings for regular and Friday examinations.

Here is the complete revised MGU Time Table 2026 for I Semester LLM Degree Examinations. The timetable includes the rescheduled dates for all four core papers. Students are advised to note the exact dates and timings carefully.
Examination Timings: 01.30 PM to 04.30 PM (All days except Friday). On Friday: 02.00 PM to 05.00 PM.

sections.heading: How to Download MGU Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the MGU Time Table 2026 from the official university website. Follow these simple steps to get the revised timetable PDF.

items: Visit the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University at www.mgu.ac.in.
Navigate to the "Examinations" or "Notifications" section on the homepage.
Look for the latest notification regarding I Semester LLM examinations 2026.
Click on the link titled "I Semester LLM Degree Examinations - Rescheduled Time Table".
The PDF file will open. Click on the download icon to save it to your device.
Take a printout of the timetable for future reference and exam preparation.

content.text: Students are advised to regularly check the official MGU website for any further updates regarding the MGU Time Table 2026.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in MGU Time Table 2026

content.text: The official MGU Time Table 2026 notification contains all essential information regarding the rescheduled I Semester LLM examinations. Here are the key details mentioned in the document:

items: Notification number and date (No.9558/EA 1/3/2019/EA 1 dated 25.05.2026)
Reference to previous notification dated 18.05.2026
Revised examination dates for all subjects
Course codes and subject names
Examination timings (01:30 PM - 04:30 PM, Friday 02:00 PM - 05:00 PM)
Applicable admissions: 2025 Regular, 2022-2024 Supplementary, 2021 First Mercy Chance
Controller of Examinations signature and contact sections.
